'''mathaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jigot|jigot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jigot|jigot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mathaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæthæjæth|mæthæjæth]] || [[word:mæthæjæj|mæthæjæj]] || [[word:mæthæjæsh|mæthæjæsh]] || [[word:mæthæjæ|mæthæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathathajath|mathathajath]] || [[word:mathathajaj|mathathajaj]] || [[word:mathathajash|mathathajash]] || [[word:mathathaja|mathathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mathajath|mathajath]] || [[word:mathajaj|mathajaj]] || [[word:mathajash|mathajash]] || [[word:mathaja|mathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathafjath|mathafjath]] || [[word:mathafjaj|mathafjaj]] || [[word:mathafjash|mathafjash]] || [[word:mathafjaf|mathafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mathajatha|mathajatha]] || [[word:mathajaja|mathajaja]] || [[word:mathajasha|mathajasha]] || [[word:mathajaka|mathajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mathajath|mathajath]] || [[word:mathajaj|mathajaj]] || [[word:mathajash|mathajash]] || [[word:mathaja|mathaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mathajathal|mathajathal]] || [[word:mathajajal|mathajajal]] || [[word:mathajashal|mathajashal]] || [[word:mathajakal|mathajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mathajathatha|mathajathatha]] || [[word:mathajajaja|mathajajaja]] || [[word:mathajashasha|mathajashasha]] || [[word:mathajaka|mathajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mathajathan|mathajathan]] || [[word:mathajajan|mathajajan]] || [[word:mathajashan|mathajashan]] || [[word:mathajakan|mathajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mathajathaoro|mathajathaoro]] || [[word:mathajajaoro|mathajajaoro]] || [[word:mathajashaoro|mathajashaoro]] || [[word:mathajakaoro|mathajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
